subject: fix(export): fix PDF being 6x larger with worse quality than image exports
body:
PDF export was using lossless PNG at pixelRatio:1, which produced the worst
of both worlds: huge file size (uncompressed PNG) and poor quality (1x
resolution looked blurry/pixelated). Switch to JPEG at 92% quality with
pixelRatio:2 — PDFs are now much smaller AND significantly sharper.

Tags: export, pdf, quality
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: export
Semver: patch

title: fix PDF being 6x larger with worse quality than image exports
